name: Naan (Indian Flat Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except milk, ghee and poppy seeds.
2. Stir in enough milk to make a soft dough.
3. Turn dough onto lightly floured surface; knead until smooth, about 5 minutes.
4. Place in greased bowl; turn greased side up.
5. Cover; let rest in warm place about 3 hours.
6. Divide dough into 8 equal parts.
7. Flatten each part on lightly floured surface, rolling it into a 6 X 4 inches leaf shape (round at one end, tapered at the other) about 1/4 inch thick.
8. Brush with ghee or oil; sprinkle with poppy seeds.
9. Place 2 cookie sheets in oven; heat oven to 450°F degrees.
10. Remove cookie sheets from oven; place breads on hot cookie sheets.
11. Bake until firm, 6-8 minutes.
